hero.headline: Nashville's HVAC team that *shows up early*
hero.subheadline: When your system quits, we don't. Real techs, not salespeople trying to upsell you on $11K duct replacements.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: AC, Heat, and Everything Between
services_section.subheading: From ancient units to brand new installs — we handle it all

services.title: AC Repair & Service
services.description: Compressor died? Not blowing cold? We'll diagnose the real problem and fix it right the first time.

services.title: Heating System Repair
services.description: Heat pump acting up or furnace on the fritz? We service all makes and models, from newer units to the ancient ones.

services.title: HVAC Installation
services.description: New unit installations with same-day turnaround when possible. Clean work, no surprises.

services.title: Smart Thermostat Install
services.description: Nest, Honeywell, Ecobee — we'll get your smart thermostat wired up and working properly.

about.heading: Straight Talk, No Upsells
about.body: We're the Nashville HVAC team that shows up on time and tells you what you actually need. No high-pressure sales, no inflated estimates.

reviews.name: Melinda S.
reviews.text: AC quit on Sunday, called Monday morning and they had someone out that afternoon. Quick response when I needed it most.

reviews.name: J G.
reviews.text: Nest thermostat install exceeded expectations. Got me in within 3 days, tech arrived early and was ultra polite. Great person who explained everything.

reviews.name: Donna Y.
reviews.text: Other company wanted $11K for duct replacement. Halo gave me an honest assessment and saved me thousands. No sales pressure.

cta.heading: System Acting Up? We're Ready
cta.body: Fast diagnosis, honest pricing, and work that lasts. Call now or request your free estimate online.
